channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Towns relishes an enjoyable return to Minnesota, from the roar of the crowd to a blowout win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns took some time to reflect on nine formative NBA seasons in Minnesota, arriving to the arena early for the morning shootaround before the rest of the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Justin Herbert passes for 2 touchdowns, Chargers score on free kick and rally past Broncos 34-27
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Trailing 21-13 at halftime Thursday night against the Denver Broncos, some wondered if the Los Angeles Chargers had any resolve left after going through their worst four-quarter stretch of the season.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taking advantage of an obscure rule, Chargers' Dicker makes NFL's first fair-catch kick in 48 years
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Of all the rules in football, Jim Harbaugh considers the obscure fair-catch kick to be his favorite. The Los Angeles Chargers coach had the opportunity to try one Thursday night for only the second time in his career.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An 'embarrassing' night for Stephen Curry and the Warriors, who fall by 51 at Memphis
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had a game like none other in his career. It was part of an awful night for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sammy Sosa appears to acknowledge PED use, apologizes; Cubs welcome him back into fold
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa appeared to acknowledge using performance enhancing drugs during a career in which he hit more than 600 home runs, and the Chicago Cubs said they were ready to welcome back their former star.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Celtics head coach admits he'd 'rather watch something else' as NBA ratings decline
item.description: The NBA's ratings are down 25% from last season, and even Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla is part of the "problem," he admitted Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RFK Stadium site provision removed from federal spending bill, a blow to the Commanders and NFL
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A provision to transfer the land that is the site of the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to the District of Columbia is no longer included in Congress' slimmed-down, short-term spending bill that lawmakers are racing to pass before a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NBC Sports studio host Brodie Brazil joining Sharks
item.description: Brazil's contract with NBC Sports was not renewed this fall and he left the local sports network after the A's Oakland finale.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Bucs' OC Liam Coen addresses NFL head coaching rumors
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers' first-year offensive coordinator Liam Coen has been excellent calling plays for the Bucs this season.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: European soccer leagues reject latest proposal for new breakaway competition
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The organization that represents European soccer leagues on Thursday rejected latest proposals for a breakaway super league. Detailed plans for a new rival to the Champions League — the Unify League — were released this week by Madrid-based A22 Sports Management.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Olympics chief hopeful vows to explore trans athletes ban amid global outrage
item.description: Former Olympic gold medalist Sebastian Coe suggested he would institute a ban on trans athletes in women's sports if elected IOC president.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cody Bellinger experienced World Series title with dad Clay at old Yankee Stadium
item.description: Bellinger won the 2019 NL MVP award with the Los Angeles Dodgers after hitting .305 with 47 homers, 115 RBIs and a 1.035 OPS.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa admits to making 'mistakes' amid steroid speculation, apologizes to estranged Cubs
item.description: A long feud between Sammy Sosa and his former Chicago Cubs is finally over after the former slugger admitted to making "mistakes" amid speculation he took steroids.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Oregon man pleads guilty to stalking Paige Bueckers after being caught with lingerie, ring for her
item.description: A 40-year-old man from the Pacific Northwest pleaded guilty to stalking Paige Bueckers after saying he wanted to marry her and was caught with lingerie and an engagement ring.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AP Exclusive: Pro tennis player Jenson Brooksby talks about living with autism
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Jenson Brooksby tugged at the right shoulder of his red T-shirt and fiddled with some strands of his dirty blond hair as he spoke to The Associated Press about what he'd like the world — the tennis world, yes, but also everyone else — to know about him.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Bull picks Liam Lawson as Max Verstappen's F1 teammate in 2025
item.description: MILTON KEYNES, England (AP) — Liam Lawson will partner world champion Max Verstappen at Red Bull in 2025, the Formula 1 team said on Thursday. Lawson, a New Zealander, replaces Sergio Perez, who was dropped on Wednesday after months of poor results.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Hernandez's brother pleads guilty to threatening a shooting at UConn
item.description: The brother of the late New England Patriots tight end Aaron Hernandez has pleaded guilty to threatening to carry out a shooting at the University of Connecticut and to kill three people outside of the state last year.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Fruita's Liv Campbell hits 1K point mark as experienced 'Cats are loaded in '24-25
item.description: Coming off a tremendous 19-4 season that saw them earn a top-10 seed in the 6A playoffs, Fruita Monument girls basketball is reloaded this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
